records.description: Python syntax error — likely Python version mismatch; disable bytecode cache to avoid stale .pyc
Indentation error — possibly stale .pyc from prior code version; disable bytecode cache

reproduction.command:
printf 'def f():
  x = 1
    y = 2
' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_indent.py && python3 /tmp/_polaris_repro_indent.py 2>&1 || true
reproduction.fix_command:
printf 'def f():
  x = 1
  y = 2
f(); print("ok")
' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_indent.py && python3 /tmp/_polaris_repro_indent.py 2>&1 || true

records.stderr_pattern: TabError: inconsistent use of tabs and spaces
records.description: Mixed tabs and spaces — disable bytecode cache to prevent stale .pyc masking the fix

reproduction.fix_command:
printf 'def f():
  x = 1
  y = 2
f(); print("ok")
' > /tmp/_polaris_repro_tab.py && python3 /tmp/_polaris_repro_tab.py 2>&1 || true
